title: Cleaners and domestics
description: Directly supervise and coordinate work activities of cleaning personnel in hotels, hospitals, offices, and other establishments. Keep buildings in clean and orderly condition. Perform heavy cleaning duties, such as cleaning floors, shampooing rugs, washing walls and glass, and removing rubbish. Duties may include tending furnace and boiler, performing routine maintenance activities, notifying management of need for repairs, and cleaning snow or debris from sidewalk. Perform any combination of light cleaning duties to maintain private households or commercial establishments, such as hotels and hospitals, in a clean and orderly manner. Duties may include making beds, replenishing linens, cleaning rooms and halls, and vacuuming. (Based on 4 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Prepare reports on activity, personnel, and departmental expenses, such as occupancy and hours worked.
Confer with staff to resolve personnel problems and discuss company policies, coordinate with other departments.
Inspect and evaluate facilities to determine the type of cleaning work required and ensure that it meets established standards.
Select suitable cleaning materials for different linens, furniture, flooring, and surfaces; instruct staff on their use.
Issue supplies and equipment to workers, maintain inventories, and ensure that cleaning materials are adequately stocked.
Supervise in-house services, such as laundries, maintenance and repair, and investigate service complaints.
Plan and prepare work schedules for employees and forecast necessary staffing and stock levels.
Perform cleaning duties, including washing windows, cleaning floors, and emptying wastebaskets, to maintain cleanliness standards.
Inspect and maintain cleaning equipment and report needs for major repairs or supplies; ensure proper use of cleaning chemicals.
Clean various areas, including rooms, hallways, and restrooms, and monitor building security and safety.
Gather and empty trash, clean and polish furniture and fixtures, and perform grounds maintenance tasks as needed.
Replenish supplies such as linens and restroom items and manage requests for repairs and cleaning services.
Direct activities for stopping infections in facilities, such as hospitals, and ensure cleaning meets health standards.

tools_used.name: Toilet brush and toilet brush holder

detailed_work_activities.title: Confer with coworkers to coordinate maintenance or cleaning activities.
Select equipment, materials, or supplies for cleaning or maintenance activities.
Maintain equipment or systems to ensure proper functioning.
Evaluate current or prospective maintenance employees.
Instruct staff in work policies or procedures.
Monitor building premises to ensure occupant or visitor safety.
Dispose of trash or waste materials.
Install parts, assemblies, or attachments in transportation or material handling equipment.
Drive trucks or other vehicles to or at work sites.
Investigate work related complaints to determine corrective actions.
Inspect buildings or grounds to determine condition.
Inspect work to ensure standards are met.
Estimate maintenance service requirements or costs.
Recommend organizational process or policy changes.
Schedule repair, installation or maintenance activities.
Mix substances or compounds needed for work activities.
Apply protective or decorative finishes to workpieces or products.
Connect hoses to equipment or machinery.
Maintain vehicles in good working condition.
